why: The forward scenario generator emits one price per day, flat-expanded to 48 equal half-hours (run_scenario.py::_expand_daily_to_hh), so forward residuals settle at DAILY granularity with no intraday shape. daily_mean is the generator's natural comparand; daily_max shows where the real half-hourly spike (GBP4,038) actually lives -- it is a sub-daily phenomenon a daily-mean series cannot and should not reach.

daily_mean.source: sim/cache/elexon_ssp_full.json aggregated to daily via sim.ssp_tail_target._daily_aggregate

daily_max.source: sim/cache/elexon_ssp_full.json aggregated to daily via sim.ssp_tail_target._daily_aggregate
